name: sample-data-room
description: Root scripts for the data-room app (frontend + backend live in their own folders).

scripts.setup: pnpm -C backend install && pnpm -C frontend install && (test -f backend/.env || cp backend/.env.example backend/.env) && pnpm -C backend exec prisma generate
scripts.dev: trap 'kill 0' EXIT; pnpm -C backend dev & pnpm -C frontend dev & wait
